svg.title: IoTextra Octal2 overview
svg.desc: IoTextra Octal2 — 8-channel digital I/O module overview with key specs
svg.text: 8-channel digital I/O module · 4 isolated inputs · 4 outputs · galvanic isolation · GPIO and/or I²C modes
Bipolar and Extended signal modes · HOST and Qwiic connectors · 47×56 mm · 5 VDC supply
Part of the IoTextra series · compatible with IoTsmart and IoTbase · Open Hardware
